data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: The design considers the number of choices given to users to optimize decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menus and option lists to enhance user navigation and efficiency.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: The UI is optimized for the speed of movement based on size and distance of clickable elements.
data.technical_spec: Placement of action buttons and interactive elements to reduce user effort.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Design expectations align with familiar patterns to enhance usability.
data.technical_spec: UI elements and navigation structured similar to commonly used platforms.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping of related elements to enhance user understanding and experience.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of UI components for better cognitive processing.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focus on optimizing the 20% of features that are used 80% of the time.
data.technical_spec: Data-driven approach to prioritize features and functionality based on user behavior analytics.
